_meta.note: Fees NZD incl GST, scraped from each council's own page. Re-verify every 1 July (see data/dog-registration-fees.md). 'onTime' = paid by the council's cutoff; 'late' = penalty fee; 'afterDue' = middle tier where a council has one.

councils.name: Auckland

extras.label: SuperGold Community Services combo card holder

councils.notes: All fees include the $2.50 National Dog Database levy.

councils.name: Wellington City

categories.label: Accredited Dog Owner
categories.note: Late reverts to standard: $222 desexed / $306.50 entire (ADO status lost if not paid by 31 July).

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (re-verified 2026-06-30). Includes the $2.50 National Dog Database levy. Late fee = 50% of registration if paid after 31 July. No separate dangerous-dog registration fee published. Puppies are charged pro-rata to 30 June.

councils.name: Christchurch City
councils.notes: Re-checked 2026-06-30: page still shows 2025/2026 schedule (2026/27 not yet published). Fee reduces pro-rata each month if first registered partway through the year.

councils.name: Hamilton City
councils.notes: Hamilton classifies by owner Category, not desexed/working. Extra $15 discount for renewing by 30 June; +50% penalty after 31 July.

councils.name: Tauranga City
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (unchanged from 2025/26). Tauranga charges a single flat fee (no desexed/working/owner discount in the main schedule); on-time fee applies before 1 August.

councils.name: Palmerston North City
councils.notes: Infringement fee for an unregistered dog is $300.

categories.label: Responsible Dog Owner (RDO)
categories.note: Late reverts to standard: $195 neutered / $253 entire.

councils.name: Nelson City
councils.notes: Fee reduces pro-rata each month if first registered after July. 50% penalty after 1 August.

councils.name: Hastings District

extras.label: Apply to keep more than two dogs

councils.notes: No separate desexed discount in the main schedule.

councils.name: Taupō District

categories.label: Responsible Owner (entire)
categories.note: Late adds the ~$20 penalty — confirm with council.

categories.label: Desexed dog
categories.note: Entire fee less the $15 desexed discount.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late is a flat +$20 after 31 July; $15 discount for desexed dogs.

councils.name: Selwyn District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Flat fee; 50% late penalty after 31 July; pro-rata for pups registered mid-year. Confirm any desexed/working discount with the council.

councils.name: Rotorua Lakes

categories.label: Desexed dog (urban)
categories.note: Urban fee less the $11 desexing rebate.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late penalty is a flat add-on ($62.50 urban / $45 rural); $11 rebate for desexed dogs.

extras.label: Permit to keep more than two dogs

councils.name: Timaru District
councils.notes: Single annual fee that pro-rates by month for dogs first registered after July; new-puppy registration is always $47. Confirm any late-payment penalty with the council.

councils.name: Waitaki District
councils.notes: Flat annual fee. Confirm any late-payment penalty with the council.

councils.name: Horowhenua District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (flat annual). A late-registration penalty applies to puppies first registered after nine months; confirm the general late penalty with the council.

councils.name: Kaipara District

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Reduced to $41 on-time ($79 late) where 4+ dogs are registered to the same owner.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Kaipara's on-time deadline is 31 August (late from 1 Sept), unlike most councils' 31 July. Page lists only working/non-working; dangerous/menacing surcharges and multi-dog permits sit in a separate Fees & Charges document not readable for 2026/27. No desexed discount or responsible-owner scheme.

councils.name: Tasman
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published on the council's own site as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Fees set by property size, not desexed status: a rural dog (property 1 ha+) is $70/$105. Dangerous dogs charged +50%. Late = +50% after 31 July. Read from the council's official fees document (council web pages WAF-blocked).

councils.name: Buller District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late = +50% from 1 August. SuperGold cardholders get 20% off (not applied above). Dogs moving into the district mid-year register free for the remainder.

councils.name: Westland District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Late = +50% from 1 August. 20% Gold Card discount on non-working fees. Dangerous dogs +50%.

councils.name: Clutha District
councils.notes: 2026/27 figures from the council's official Proposed Fees & Charges schedule (S3-hosted PDF; header '1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027'). Council web pages were WAF-blocked. Rural non-working dog is $76/$114. Dangerous dog = base +50% (urban base shown). Late = +50% penalty after 1 August. No desexed discount.

councils.name: Southland District

categories.label: Service dog (disability assist) with current papers

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council's official Animal Control Fees & Charges PDF. Late = +50% after 1 August. Desexed (-$30) and responsible-owner (-$30) discounts stack to $50. Discount evidence must be provided before 1 May. Dangerous dog = base +50% ($110 x1.5).

councils.name: Invercargill City
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council's official Annual Plan Fees & Charges 2026-2027 PDF (icc.govt.nz pages WAF-blocked). Late fee = +25% after 1 August (late amounts = base x1.25). Dangerous dog: entire $181.50, desexed $157.50. Menacing dog $151.25. Pro-rata monthly for new registrations.

councils.name: Chatham Islands

categories.label: Standard dog registration
categories.note: $50 early registration (on-time); $78 standard once the early discount is removed.

councils.notes: Figures from the Chatham Islands Council animal control page (cic.govt.nz). The page states no registration year; per the Dog Control Policy 2022, dogs must be registered by 30 June for the ensuing year, so applied to 2026/27. Only two amounts are published online ($50 early, $78 standard). Policy says a lower working-dog rate and a dangerous-dog rate (+50%) exist but no dollar figures are published.

councils.name: Waikato District
councils.notes: Waikato classifies by owner type. General owner $120/$140 (standard); Selected owner $60/$80 and Approved owner $95/$115 are good-owner tiers (Selected shown for the responsible-owner toggle); Farm owner $54/$74 shown for working/rural. Submit a desexing certificate for a free registration year (dogs registered within the past 12 months, excludes dangerous/menacing). Page schedule effective 2025-2027.

councils.name: Matamata-Piako District

categories.label: Full fee less Responsible Owner rebate

councils.notes: From the council's DRAFT 2026/27 fees schedule adopted for consultation (final live page WAF-blocked). Full fee $172 (verbatim). A $30 rebate applies for ONE of: de-sexed dog, working dog, or Dogs NZ registered breeder (so working and desexed both = $142). Separate Responsible Owner rebate $15. Late = +50% penalty (computed). Dangerous dog = 150% of relevant fee (computed).

councils.name: Waipā District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: No fee if re-registered by the due date; standard fees apply after.

councils.notes: From the council's official DRAFT Schedule of Fees and Charges 2025-27 (have-your-say document). Rural dog (full year) is $64/$96 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Due 30 June; +50% penalty from 1 August (the 'late' column = standard + 50% penalty). Dangerous dogs pay an additional 50% of the usual fee. Fencing rebate requires a property inspection; neutered rebate requires a vet certificate.

councils.name: Ōtorohanga District
councils.notes: Page states 'Dog Registration Fees approved for 1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027'. Rural dogs $72/$108 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Late = additional 50% if not registered by 1 August (late figures computed). No dangerous-dog dollar figure published.

councils.name: Waitomo District

extras.label: Consent to keep more than 2 urban dogs

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (confirmed on live site and Annual Plan PDF). Rural dogs $59/$88.50 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle); every 6th of 5 rural dogs free if paid on time. Gold-card urban concession $120/$180. Late = +50%. Dangerous dog = 150% of the otherwise-applicable fee.

councils.name: Whakatāne District

categories.label: Assist / disability dog
categories.note: Certified disability assist dogs — no charge.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Discount deadline 1 August 2026; fees increase after. Dangerous-classified dogs pay an additional 50% on top of the above (dangerousDog = entire +50%).

councils.name: Kawerau District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Late = +50% penalty (computed). Pro-rata monthly schedule applies to puppies/new registrations. No working-dog or responsible-owner rate.

councils.name: Wairoa District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Wairoa's on-time deadline is 31 August (late from 1 Sept). Menacing dog (Class M) $266/$399. No desexed discount.

councils.name: Whanganui District
councils.notes: Fees set by council resolution 24 March 2026 for 1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027. Whanganui uses a prompt-payment discount model: 'onTime' = paid by 31 July (with discount); 'late' = the standard base fee (no discount). A separate late-payment PENALTY of 150% of the applicable fee applies to registrations paid on or after 1 September. Discounts: neutered -$27, RDO -$27, first-time -$14.50. Dangerous dog = 150% of $147 entire fee = $220.50.

councils.name: Rangitīkei District

categories.label: Working dog (each, up to five dogs)
categories.note: Sixth and additional working dogs $13 each (on-time only).

councils.notes: From the official Fees and Charges 2026/2027 schedule (s37(6) Dog Control Act 1996) plus the council's 4 June 2026 public notice. Payable by 1 August; +50% surcharge on fees not paid before 1 August (produces the 'late' figures). Dangerous dog: de-sexed $165/$247.50, entire $247.50/$371.25 (entire shown).

councils.name: Napier City
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (page states 'approved for 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026'; 2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Due by 1 August; penalty after 1 August. No separate desexed discount.

councils.name: Central Hawke's Bay District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (CHB classes them within the working-dog definition).

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (page states 'apply for July 1 2026 - June 30 2027'). Rural pet dog $65 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). SuperGold (Gold Card) and Responsible Dog Owner reduced fees exist but exact dollar figures are NOT published online ('no change'). After 1 August a penalty of up to 50% of the registration fee per dog applies (late figures computed from the stated up-to-50%).

councils.name: New Plymouth District
councils.notes: 2026/27 column read from NPDC's official Schedule of Fees and Charges (PDF covers 1 July 2025 – 30 June 2027). Rural dog $72.70 (first two dogs)/$37.10 (3rd+) — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Pensioner (65+) select rates: desexed $92.50, entire $121. Late is a TIERED penalty: +25% after 1 August (shown as 'late'), +50% after 1 December. Dangerous dogs pay applicable fee +50% (no fixed figure published).

councils.name: Kāpiti Coast District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Penalty applies if paid after 5pm, 31 July 2026. Dangerous dog: entire $350/$525 (shown), desexed $200/$300. Owner-over-65 fees equal Approved owner fees.

councils.name: Carterton District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law. (Carterton's page charges certified seeing-eye/hearing dogs 50% of the stated fee, not free; the statutory disability-assist exemption is applied here.)

councils.notes: 2026/27 schedule (page last updated 15 Jun 2026). Rural owner $77 (1st/2nd dog), $42 subsequent. Owners over 65 (urban) pay $75 on-time / $112.50 late. 50% late penalty for all dogs not registered by 1 August. Dangerous-dog late computed at +50%.

councils.name: South Wairarapa District

extras.label: Permit for more than 2 urban dogs

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027). Rural rates (not shown — no rural toggle): desexed $53/$78, entire $87/$129, dangerous $79/$119; flat fee for up to 10 rural dogs $275/$412. Late = additional 50% after 1 August. No working-dog or responsible-owner discount published.

councils.name: Waimakariri District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law; also exempt from the per-owner fee.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (page states 1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027). Waimakariri charges a uniform per-owner fee ($51 on-time / +50% late) PLUS a per-dog fee (entire $60, desexed $32, working $15, dangerous $124). The category amounts above INCLUDE the $51 owner fee (correct for a single-dog owner); the owner fee is charged once regardless of dog count. Late = +50%. No responsible-owner discount.

councils.name: Mackenzie District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule read from the council's own Let's Talk fees PDF (mackenzie.govt.nz WAF-blocked; 2026/27 not confirmable — Mackenzie held 2025/26 flat vs 2024/25; re-check). Rural dog $40/$60 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Menacing dog $150 (no separate dangerous line). Late = +50% after 1 August. RDO requires a $25 initial inspection.
